rulings.Case Title: KAUSHIK DATTANI VS. MICHAEL JENNINGS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Post-Judgment Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 17, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF KAUSHIK DATTANI's Motion For Post-Judgment Attorney Fees GRANTED. Plaintiff shall recover $350 in costs and $32,129.01 in post-judgment and appeal fees.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUDY FANN KUMMER ET AL VS. MARK DAVIES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Appoint Sarah Burke As Special Master
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 17, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT MARK DAVIES and DAVIES CONSTRUCTION's Motion To Appoint Sarah Burke As Special Master GRANTED as requested. No opposition filed. Moving party prepare order. All further motions in this case to be noticed in department 302. Department 501 handles All Law & Motion matters for civil cases arising out of ownership of real property, possession of real property, acquisition of real property, and damage to real property (except construction defect cases). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRODERICK STREET APARTMENT GROUP, LP VS. JAVIER SALAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Discovery Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Def Javier Salas; Mpa
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 17, 2017 line 9. PLAINTIFF BRODERICK STREET APARTMENT GROUP, L's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One and Two, and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,460.= (501/REQ)
